differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy with inflammatory response (PML-IRIS)
next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining (CD20, CD3, CD68, GFAP, Ki-67, SV40) on biopsy tissue
Comprehensive microbiological culture of biopsy tissue (fungal, aerobic, anaerobic, Nocardia, mycobacterial)
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid cytology, flow cytometry, and PCR for EBV and JC virus
Serum testing for HIV and detailed immunophenotyping to characterize degree of cellular immunosuppression
Review of original histology with specialized neuropathology consultation for possible occult infection or inflammatory mimic
